title: EARLY HEARING DETECTION AND INTERVENTION - 211info
text: OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION EARLY HEARING DETECTION AND INTERVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Comprehensive, coordinated system of support services for infants with hearing loss and their families. After screening, EHDI offers referrals to family support programs, early intervention, hearing aids and medical evaluation of ear, return audiology appointments and public health nurse as necessary. 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (971) 673-0264 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 673-1222 Main phone (971) 673-1299 FAX 711 TTY/TTD (800) 422-6012 Toll-free Main (971) 673-0264 Toll-free (888) 917-4327 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information. Website contains lists of audiologists that perform infant and toddler hearing screenings. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Hearing Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ALERT IMMUNIZATION INFORMATION SYSTEM COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM CONSUMER REGULATION - BIRTH CERTIFICATES CONSUMER REGULATION - OREGON VITAL RECORDS CONSUMER REGULATION - SENIOR FARM DIRECT APPLICATION FOR FARMERS & FARM STANDS DISASTER SERVICES - STATE EMERGENCY REGISTRY OF VOLUNTEERS IN OREGON DISASTER SERVICES - WINTER WEATHER ADVISORIES ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AND IMPROVEMENT - CLIMATE CHANGE AND HEALTH FOOD - SENIOR FARM DIRECT NUTRITION PROGRAM FOOD - WIC FARM DIRECT NUTRITION PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - BREAST AND CERVICAL CANCER TREATMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON IMMUNIZATION PROGRAM HUMAN REPRODUCTION - A SAFE PLACE FOR NEWBORNS HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH HUMAN REPRODUCTION - STATE OF OREGON CONDOM DELIVERY PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - DEATH WITH DIGNITY ACT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PSILOCYBIN SERVICES PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OREGON PRESCRIPTION DRUG PROGRAM ARRAYRX PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OREGON WIC ADMINISTRATION PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE INFORMATION PUBLIC HEALTH - ENVIRONMENTAL PUBLIC HEALTH PUBLIC HEALTH - LOCAL PUBLIC HEALTH AUTHORITY DIRECTORY PUBLIC SAFETY - OHA DRINKING WATER DATA ONLINE SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - OREGON MEDICAL MARIJUANA PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES FOR CHILDREN SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - OREGON HOPELINE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - TOBACCO QUIT LINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
